title: Measurement of Steady-State ATP Levels and NAD+/NADH Ratios
author: Wen Aw
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.rted6je

steps.title: ATP and NAD + and NADH...
steps.instruction: ATP and NAD + and NADH metabolites were extracted from female third instar wandering larvae harbouring Alstonville and Dahomey mtDNA raised on 1:2 P:C and 1:16 P:C diets (7 replicates per mitotype-diet combination)

steps.title: The extracted metabolites were analysed using...
steps.instruction: The extracted metabolites were analysed using liquid chromatography (LC) electrospray ionisation tandem mass spectrometry (ESI-MS/MS)

steps.title: ATP levels were determined by quantifying...
steps.instruction: ATP levels were determined by quantifying the area under the curve.

steps.title: The NAD + /NADH ratio was...
steps.instruction: The NAD + /NADH ratio was calculated as relative differences in peak areas between NAD + and NADH metabolites.
